svg.title: Oracle Fusion HCM Learning Cloud — v6 Unified Architecture: Multi-Agent Team on RAG Retrieval Substrate
svg.desc: Version 6 merges two systems: the production semantic-search RAG pipeline (offline LLM-enriched ingestion with three-vector chunking, and online query with semantic cache, parallel ANN, score fusion, 32k context assembly) as the retrieval substrate beneath the multi-agent compliance workflow (supervisor plus four specialists, harness, guardrails). Five integration points I1 to I5 are marked at the seam.
svg.text: Oracle Fusion HCM Learning Cloud — v6 Unified Architecture
Multi-agent compliance workflow (top) running ON the production RAG retrieval substrate (bottom) · integration seam marked I1–I5
AGENTIC LAYER — AGENT TEAM · HARNESS · GUARDRAILS (v1–v5: loops · budgets · P1–P8)
MANAGER QUERY · ⑤ mutex · P5 gate-timeout
"Who hasn't completed compliance training?"
P3 ELIGIBILITY PRE-FILTER (code) · leave · notice · grace-period · transfers — before any LLM sees the roster
SUPERVISOR — bounded Plan→Act→Observe→Reflect · ≈4k budget
② 2 retries/step · ④ plan-hash · ③ timeouts · batch controller 50/batch · summarize-then-discard
checks dispute registry (P2) + policy version before classification
1 · HCM Data Agent · ≈8k/batch
Field projection (6 fields) · pagination cap
P1 freshness: sync-SLA flag suppression
/hcm/v4/workers · learningRecords (projected)
2 · Compliance Analyzer · ≈12k
Rule table first (500 tok) · citations mandatory
P2: disputed → UNDER_REVIEW · ambiguity halt 20%
ambiguous cases → RAG substrate (I2, top-5)
3 · Notification Agent · ≈1.5k/email
Per-recipient · idempotent · moderated
P5 graduated ladder · P6 locale windows
appeal link (P2) in every email
4 · Course Recommender · ≈4k
Per-person · top-3 best-effort
P7: RBAC catalog · budget flag · freq cap
retrieval = RAG substrate (I1)
HUMAN GATE — approve before send · 10% forced review · P2 dispute freezes escalation
preview: staged list + citations + one sample email
HARNESS STATE — externalized memory
disputes · rungs · dedup · plan hashes · rec-frequency
07 SYSTEM GUARDRAILS — injection filter · PII masking · moderation · citation-or-drop · loop guards ①–⑥ · token budgets · gateway 32k cap
Compliance report · policy-stamped · UNDER_REVIEW shown
counts by code, narrative by LLM (≈3k)
Reminders · graduated · localized · appealable
idempotent · sync-lag disclaimer embedded
Recommendations · match_reason surfaced to manager
decoupled timing · RBAC-visible · capped
01 Loops · 02 MCP · 03 Multi-agent · 04 Gateway · 05 Economics · 06 Evals · 07 Guardrails · 08 Observability · 09 Harness · P1–P8 person-protecting
INTEGRATION SEAM — the RAG pipeline is a TOOL the agents orchestrate
I1 Recommender → Vector B (Outcomes+Skills) retrieval per person · I2 Analyzer ambiguous-case top-5 via fusion · I3 org_id ANN pre-filter = scope guardrail inside retrieval
I4 shared 32k dynamic context assembly serves ALL agent calls · I5 semantic cache + model_version metadata back P8 eval-gated migrations
I1
I2
RAG RETRIEVAL SUBSTRATE — YOUR PRODUCTION SEMANTIC SEARCH PIPELINE (built previously, now agent-consumable)
ONLINE QUERY PIPELINE · p95 cache-miss 700–900ms
Query in: learner search OR agent call (I1/I2) — same entry
"leadership courses for managers" / "similar to {completed course outcomes}"
Semantic cache — query vector + org_id · cosine ≥ 0.93 · HIT <50ms (I5)
serves learner UI and agent calls alike
Query embedding — /internal-embeddings → 1,536-dim · same model as ingest (non-negotiable) · 30–60ms
Parallel ANN cosine search · org_id PRE-FILTER (I3 = scope enforced in-index) · ~80–120ms
Vector A
Title+Desc+Syllabus
content queries
Vector B ← I1 path
Outcomes+Skills
skill-gap precision
Vector C
Root / LearningItemId
sparse fallback
Score fusion + dedup — group by learning_item_id · keep highest · match_reason = winning vector · ~10ms
match_reason surfaces in the manager UI (why this course was recommended)
Dynamic 32K context assembly (I4 — shared by ALL agent calls)
priority: system → query → mandatory → skill-gap → semantic · stop at 3,000 remaining
/orchestrator/rag/v1/internal-answer — grounded · cited LearningItemIds · 400–800ms
agents may stop at fusion output (retrieval-only) — generation optional per caller
Ranked results → HCM Learning Cloud UI · AND → Course Recommender (I1) / Analyzer (I2)
one pipeline, two consumers: learners and agents
OFFLINE INGESTION — ESS BATCH · repeats per catalog item
ESS job → GET /hcmRestApi/learningItems?Status=ORA_ACTIVE&limit=500&expand=syllabus,outcomes
raw item: LearningItemId · Title · Description · Syllabus · Outcomes · Prerequisites · OrgId
LLM enrichment — POST /orchestrator/rag/v1/internal-summaries
system: org industry profile · out: expandedTitle · summary · skills[] · keywords[] · jobRoles[]
llm_inferred flagged in metadata — enriched claims distinguishable from source-of-truth
Content-based semantic chunking — boundaries at meaning changes, not word count
Vector A: Title+Desc+Syllabus · Vector B: Outcomes/Skills · Vector C: Root
Embedding — once per chunk → 1,536-dim · SAME model as query time (non-negotiable)
/orchestrator/llm/v1/internal-embeddings
Vector DB upsert — key: chunk_id (idempotent, replace on re-run)
metadata: learning_item_id · org_id (I3) · vector_type · semantic_section · llm_inferred · model_version (I5)
Oracle 23ai AI Vector Search — vectors + HCM transactional data, one RBAC boundary
Delta runs — LastUpdateDate > last_run_ts · only changed items re-enriched/re-embedded
enrichment content-hash cache kills ~95% of /internal-summaries calls on deltas
deactivated courses → vectors DELETED (Recommender can never surface retired content)
FAILURE HANDLING (production-hardened)
enrich fails → dead-letter queue · 429 → exponential backoff
job interrupted → checkpoint offset resume
model upgrade → BLUE-GREEN vector migration (P8 for embeddings — I5)
the harness's dead-letter + checkpoint patterns the agent layer inherits
index serves ANN
SHARED SERVICES — 04 AI GATEWAY (OCI): auth vault · routing · quotas · 32k input cap · semantic cache · token logs
One gateway fronts BOTH systems: agent LLM calls + /internal-summaries + /internal-embeddings + /internal-answer · P8 eval-gate + canary on every routing change
06 EVALS + 08 OBSERVABILITY — one dashboard, two systems
agent: retry/timeout/dispute/fairness rates · RAG: cache hit %, ANN p95, fusion quality, ingest dead-letter depth · shared: tokens, cost-per-run, model_version drift
ORACLE-NATIVE END TO END: AI Agent Studio · Fusion HCM RBAC · HCM REST v4 · Learning Cloud · Business Object Tool · ESS · ONS · Oracle 23ai Vector Search · OCI IAM · OCI API Gateway
RAG substrate exposed to Agent Studio as: Document Tool replacement + MCP tool endpoint — agents consume it exactly like any other governed tool
Agentic layer (harness)
RAG retrieval substrate (your prior build)
Integration seam I1–I5
P1–P8 person guards
Shared gateway + LLMs
System guardrails + failure handling
LLM-powered stages
v6 thesis: a mature RAG system becomes a TOOL that agents orchestrate — retrieval as substrate, agency as the layer above
Two systems, one seam, one gateway, one observability plane · Reference architecture · diagrams are original work · Oracle marks are trademarks of Oracle Corporation
